/* Generated by EPP 1.0beta3 (by lisp-epp1.0beta3) */

class TestMath {
  public static void main(String argv[]){
    System.out.println((java.lang.Math.max(5.0, 10.0)) == (10.0)); 
    System.out.println((java.lang.Math.abs( -(1.0))) == (1.0)); 
    System.out.println((java.lang.Math.sin(0.0)) == (0.0)); 
    }
  }
